zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Notton於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾諾頓時，她的父親Richard de Ford-41歲，母親Mrs. Richard de Ford-45歲。她與William Heron結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年之前在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Notton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Notton in Lacock (Wilts) or Notton in Maiden Newton (Dorset), both of which are recorded as Natton and Netton in the 13th century. The place-names derive from Old English nēat ‘cattle’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Noton .

variants.name: Natton
meanings: English: variant of both   Notton   and   Noton  .

variants.name: Noton
meanings: English: locative name from Notton (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Notone in 1086 and Nocton in 1230. The place-name derives from Old English hnoc ‘wether sheep’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’. There has probably been some confusion with Notton , and perhaps also with Knutton and Nocton .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Notton was born about 1240, in Notton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Ford, was -41 and her mother, Mrs. Richard de Ford, was -45. She married William Heron. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1297, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Notton(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Ford(은)는 -41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Richard de Ford(은)는 -45세였다. 그녀는 William Heron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 사망했다.
